name: Sarah M.
quote: The structures library changed how I negotiate. I moved from hourly billing to a hybrid fee plus backend — and now I own a piece of what I build.

name: James T.
quote: The Premium Service Model framework helped me restructure my pricing entirely. The negotiation scripts alone were worth the membership.

name: Maria L.
quote: The case studies are what set this apart. Real deals, real structures. Reading how others negotiated product partnerships gave me the template to structure my own.

name: David K.
quote: The most comprehensive resource I've found on creative deal structures. The holding company framework helped me rethink the architecture of my own business.
